# response text, spinner lines, and multiple blank lines between sections.
╭──────────────────────── Claude Code ───────────────────────────╮
│ claude-sonnet-4-6 · context 24 103 / 200 000  ✓                │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

⠿ Thinking…

╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ I have read the file and identified the issue.                  │
│                                                                  │
│ The root cause is that the cache key includes the user ID but   │
│ not the tenant ID, so requests from different tenants can share  │
│ cache entries.                                                   │
│                                                                  │
│ Here is the fix I will apply:                                   │
│                                                                  │
│ 1. Include tenant_id in the cache key computation.              │
│ 2. Add a regression test that verifies cross-tenant isolation.  │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯


╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ > _                                                             │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
